purpose: Charter section 19 item 13: classify every paper-facing claim. Machine-evidenced; each row cites the binding artifact.

CONFIRMED.definition: Survives every comparator, resource, metric, observability, action-trajectory, and confirmatory gate on virgin tapes.

BOUNDARY_NULL.definition: Genuinely tested under a frozen, machine-audited contract and found to have no deployable adaptive value (H_obs LCB95 < 0.01 or fails a guardrail), with the failure mechanism identified. These are publishable boundary results.

claims.claim: Thesis-native buffer/shift control exposes no deployable adaptive headroom
claims.artifact: phase0_failure_taxonomy.json family A; L-program gate2 STOP_NO_DEPLOYABLE_ADAPTIVE_HEADROOM
claims.failure_arrow: physical authority -> ranking reversal (failed: PPO 0/5, retention null)

claims.claim: Full-contract same-contract static comparator reverses the apparent PPO advantage (Track B)
claims.artifact: results/paper2_bottleneck/... (delta -1.8e-5, CI [-2.9e-5,-8.1e-6]); this is the project's foundational methodological result

claims.claim: Engineered nonstationarity yields at most tiny switcher advantage below practical bars (Track C)
Backorder priority (D1) has no observably convertible ReT headroom
claims.failure_arrow: observable conversion (failed: tree increases lost orders 23%)

claims.claim: CSSU allocation (DRA-1) has negligible oracle headroom after prefix balancing
claims.failure_arrow: perfect-information headroom (failed: too small + no diversity)

claims.claim: Finite convoy (DRA-2/2b) has clairvoyant headroom but no practical service conversion
Observable conversion of DRA-2b headroom fails (Program E); 0/10 PPO seeds beat static
claims.failure_arrow: learned value (failed: learner collapses to best static)

claims.claim: Mitigation portfolio (Program F) has oracle headroom but 0/24 cells convert observably
Spatial commitment (Program G) has no robust adaptive value under the stylized contract; service-loss proxy win reverses under canonical ret_excel
claims.failure_arrow: observable headroom (failed: metric reversal + fairness concentration + ABAB dominates)

claims.claim: Belief-state rescue of G (Program H) has a material PI ceiling but no belief policy converts it; bound not tight enough for formal impossibility
Thesis-control branching (Program I) has no resource-adjusted local headroom; only scarcity x concurrency moves H_obs and it fails the fairness guardrail
claims.failure_arrow: observable headroom (failed: all oracle deltas ~1e-5; the one positive region starves a CSSU)

claims.claim: Serial-line maintenance allocation (Program J) has negligible canonical ReT ceiling (~1e-4); PPO beats static in 0/6 seeds
claims.failure_arrow: learned value (failed: physical magnitude too small + dominant calendar)

claims.claim: Lateral transshipment is dominated by central resupply under current physics (no thesis-native lateral lane)
Multi-echelon information lag alone cannot create value (information monotonicity)
Admission/abandonment reduces to D1 (backorder priority) under current physics (no operational abandonment)

UNRESOLVED_BOUND.definition: A tested policy-level result exists, but the strongest same-contract frontier or a valid resource-restricted ceiling is not yet certified. No family-level null, positive result, or terminal boundary claim is allowed.

claims.claim: Integrated M/T/R signal control is a policy null, while the full equal-resource 11,184,811-calendar frontier remains unresolved
claims.note: The earlier componentwise-unequal comparison and best-of-constants LCB are not an H_PI ceiling. The complete 11,611-calendar <=3-switch calibration screen passed 696,660-rollout deep replay, but its unique winner uses all three allowed switches. The complete 89,131-calendar <=4 producer is running after a passed preflight; a running job is not evidence and must pass terminal custody plus separate 5,347,920-rollout deep replay. Neither shell is H_PI, H_obs, a family null or a positive result.

EXPLORATORY.definition: Mechanism is materially new and Garrido-defensible in principle, but blocked on an operational fact only Garrido can supply. Not a result; a conditional candidate.

claims.claim: Multi-product mix with setup/BOM/substitution MIGHT create observable headroom (conditional on Garrido Q1)
claims.artifact: candidate_family_ledger.json F8 (tier 1, blocked_domain_fact); lit_comparator_obligations.md (Roundy 98% result => value only under non-stationarity)
claims.condition: Garrido confirms distinct BOMs OR setup OR partial substitution; AND toy bound clears 0.01 against power-of-two cyclic + rolling-horizon WW+(s,S)

claims.claim: Finite multi-destination fleet with persistent vehicle location MIGHT create observable headroom (conditional on Garrido Q2)
claims.artifact: candidate_family_ledger.json F10 (tier 1, blocked_domain_fact); lit_comparator_obligations.md (Bertsimas-van Ryzin => value only under non-stationary/asymmetric demand)
claims.condition: Garrido confirms finite fleet serving >=2 destinations with round-trip commitment; AND toy bound clears 0.01 against MaxPressure + recomputed partition policy

claims.artifact: candidate_family_ledger.json F1 (tier 2); lit review section 2 (Huh 2009, Zhang 2020)
claims.condition: Garrido confirms demand quantity is genuinely unobserved under some disruption mode

claims.claim: A high-consequence alarm-predictable failure mode MIGHT create maintenance headroom (conditional on Garrido Q5)
claims.condition: Garrido confirms a precursor-predictable failure with ret_excel consequence at least 74.72x J's best screened restricted-oracle effect, before observable-conversion losses

SUPERSEDED.definition: Raw artifact retains a positive field but a later corrective artifact overrides it via superseded_by/effective_verdict. Machine readers MUST honor the chain.

claims.claim: K3 observable-ret headroom (CONFIRM_K3_OBSERVABLE_RET_HEADROOM)
K3 neural incremental value (CONFIRM_K3_NEURAL_INCREMENTAL_VALUE)
Program G G5 virgin-confirmed adaptive win (service-loss proxy)

RETRACTED.definition: Formally retracted; the positive claim is false. Same items as SUPERSEDED where the effective verdict is a RETRACT.

claims.claim: K3 adaptive AND neural claims (period-8 open-loop confound)

QUARANTINED_BLOCKED.definition: A proposed contract or runner failed source, observability, comparator or governance audit. Any execution discovered outside authorization and custody is quarantined, burns its tapes, and supplies no scientific result.

claims.claim: The rejected standalone factory-APP Cobb-Douglas v1 runner is not a faithful or deployable headroom test
claims.effective_verdict: QUARANTINED_UNAUTHORIZED_PRE_REJECTION_EXECUTION_DISCOVERED_POST_AUDIT; 9600001-9600400 burned; paper_reproduces_dominant_pure was hard-coded; exact mathematical transform survives, numerical runner and raw output do not

FUTURE_WORK.definition: Honestly supportable next steps that do not depend on a manufactured positive result.

current_verdict.terminal_outcome_pending: Awaiting a stronger M/T/R open-loop frontier or valid resource-restricted ceiling. The <=3-switch comparator gate is deep-replay verified but boundary-active, so the next authorized step is the separately frozen complete <=4-switch calibration gate on the VPS. F8/F10 and other researcher extensions remain domain-blocked pending Garrido facts; no terminal outcome B is currently valid.
current_verdict.honest_strongest_paper2_today: Methodological / boundary result (state-action-metric alignment or decision-right discovery), NOT a positive adaptive-control paper. Consistent with docs/PAPER_CLAIM_FREEZE_2026-07-12.md.
